mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cctv_infos WHERE ST_Distance_Sphere(location, ST_GeomFromText(#{wktPoint}, 4326)) <= #{radius}) AS cctvCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM street_lights WHERE ST_Distance_Sphere(location, ST_GeomFromText(#{wktPoint}, 4326)) <= #{radius}) AS streetLightCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM security_lights WHERE ST_Distance_Sphere(location, ST_GeomFromText(#{wktPoint}, 4326)) <= #{radius}) AS securityLightCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM security_facilities WHERE (POWER(x - #{epsg3857X}, 2) + POWER(y - #{epsg3857Y}, 2)) <= POWER(#{projectedRadius}, 2)) AS policeStationCount

SELECT cctv_count AS cctvCount, security_light_count AS securityLightCount, security_facility_count AS policeStationCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM street_lights WHERE ST_Distance_Sphere(location, ST_GeomFromText(#{wktPoint}, 4326)) <= #{radius}) AS streetLightCount FROM property_safety_summary WHERE property_id = #{propertyId}
